name: Venison Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the thinly sliced steak with a saucer edge or meat hammer until it reaches an even thickness.
2. Cut into 4-inch squares.
3. Sprinkle each piece of steak with salt and pepper.
4. Spread with sausage meat.
5. Peel and quarter the carrots lengthwise.
6. Place several strips of carrot on each piece of steak.
7. Roll up tightly and secure with string, toothpicks, or skewers.
8. Flour the rolls lightly on all sides.
9. Brown in hot shortening until golden brown on the outside.
10. Partially cover with water, place a lid on the pan, and cook in a moderate oven (359°F) for 1-1/2 to 2 hours until tender.
Source: Agricultural Extension Service
The University of Tennessee Institute of Agriculture
